description_long: This shrine is set on a raised, earth-toned platform bordered by low retaining walls and wooden posts connected by a dark rope or cable. A rustic wooden structure with a slanted, shingled roof sits to one side, resembling a small chapel or hut, with a simple bench and a table in front, possibly for offerings or rituals. The ground is uneven, featuring a stone path leading to the shrine, flanked by patches of grass and a large, stylized coniferous tree at the center. Scattered rocks and a small patch of greenery add naturalistic detail to the scene. The overall design is minimalistic, with rough textures and a subdued color palette dominated by browns, grays, and greens. The shrine appears to be a modest, possibly rural or park-side religious site, blending natural and built elements.
description: A rustic wooden shrine on a raised, earthy platform with a stone path, stylized tree, and simple bench and table for offerings. The scene is bordered by wooden posts and rope, with natural rocks and grass adding detail.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main wooden shrine structure, stone path, bench, table, and central tree, with the retaining wall and posts clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the side of the shrine building, the stone path, and the large rock near the structure, with the posts and rope framing the scene.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the shrine, the stylized tree, and the grassy slope, with the posts and rope enclosing the area.
description_view_3: Front-right view showing the entry path, grassy patches, and the approach to the shrine, with the bench and table visible near the building.
attribute_entryway_design: simple open entry with no door, framed by wooden posts and a stone path
